extraction_metrics.extracted_preview: The Claude API is a RESTful API at https://api.anthropic.com that provides programmatic access to Claude models and Claude Managed Agents. New to Claude? For direct model access, start with Get started and Working with Messages . For managed agent infrastructure, see the Claude Managed Agents quicks...

structured_data.method: Structured data quality and completeness validation
structured_data.score_calculation: Type appropriateness (20) + Field completeness (30) + Multiple formats (20) + Schema validation (30)

dom_navigability.score_calculation: Based on violation severity and frequency

metadata_completeness.method: Metadata field presence and quality check
metadata_completeness.score_calculation: Sum of field scores (title 15, description 15, author 15, date 15, topic 15, language 10, canonical 15)

http_compliance.score_calculation: HTML reachability (15) + Redirect efficiency (25) + Robots/crawl permissions (20) + Cache headers (20) + Agent content hints (20)
